content_text: ï»¿ Toyota Glanza Car | Price | Colors | Specifications | Interior | Mileage - Toyota India OverView Overview Exterior Interior Connected Performance Safety Accessories Specifications Test Drive × Cool new look The wide and sharp horizontal chrome bar, a Toyota signature, accentuates the upper grill. And a large trapezoidal lower grille with carbon fiber texture exudes a sporty look. All so you arrive in style, wherever you go. LED projector and daytime running light Light up the roads ahead for a cooler, clearer view with LED projector headlamps and daytime running light. LED tail lamps Even the tail lamps feature LED lights, so you leave a bolder impression no matter where you're headed. Follow-me-home lamp Parked in a dimly lit area? No worries. The headlamps stay on while you find your way. Auto ORVMs with indicators Nothing's cooler than outdoor rear-view mirrors that open when you unlock, and fold when you lock the car. They also feature indicators for added safety. LED fog lamps Finding your way should never be hard. Even on cold, foggy nights. The LED fog lamps weatherproof your hatch-up plans. Auto headlamps The headlamps feature light sensing capabilities, so you won't have to manually control them anymore. UV protect glass Don't let a sunny day get in the way of an awesome hatch-up plan, with UV protect glass. Comfort, style, and technology. Made Awesome together. All-new Smart Playcast The cool new Glanza's ports a floating 22.86 cm Smart Playcast. Loaded with smart features and designed to exude coolness, it makes every one of your hatch-up plans more awesome Head-up display Why bother taking your eyes off the road, even if it's to check your speed? Get essential drive details on the head-up display. Hey Toyota Dial a buddy. Play music. Or get the vehicle info you need. All you've got to say is âHey Toyotaâ and ask away. Advanced voice assistant Make your hatch up plans more awesome with Smart Playcast, bringing the smart assistant on your phone to the cool new Glanza. Say hey to Siri or Google Assistant. Compatible with Android AutoTM and Apple CarPlayTM. Intelligent Gear Shift AMT/MT Hatchin' cooler, more comfortable drives is cakewalk with Intelligent Gear Shift. Not just that, you get to choose between manual and auto transmission, while ensuring awesome mileage. 360Â° view Parking is a whole lot breezy with a 360Â° view of your surroundings, right on the classy 9-inch infotainment screen. Tilt & telescopic steering Adjust the steering wheel to your liking with tilt and telescoping steering adjustments. So that every time you go hatchin', you do so comfortably. Rear AC vents & USB connectivity Being in the backseat doesn't mean being away from comfort and convenience. Experience a new level of rear-seat comfort, with AC vents to keep you chill and USB ports to keep you always charged. Spacious legroom & headroom Every single drive feels more awesome in the cool new Glanza. Thanks to the spacious interiors that leave enough room for you to stretch and find your spot, even at full capacity. Steering-mounted audio control Why take your hands off the wheel to turn up the music? Or pause it for a quick word? Steering-mounted audio control has got you covered. Auto AC What's better than AC on a hot day? AC that adjusts the cabin temperature to your liking, all by itself. Trunk lamp & spacious boot A spacious boot, for all the times a hatch-up plan gets bigger than expected. And a trunk lamp, so you're not fiddling about in the dark. No keys, no hassle. Just New-Gen tech. Whattaflex . Remote check & control - odometer, headlamps, hazard, distance to empty Stay connected with your car even when you're not in it. All with one app. Get all the info you need. And if that wasn't enough, you get to lock the car, and control the headlamps and hazard light too. Find my car Often find yourself getting lost in a maze of parked cars? That's old news, all thanks to Find My Car. Vehicle health report - warning & malfunction indicator, service reminder based on mileage & time Know what's up with your car, without even being around it. Stay on top of your vehicle's health with warning and malfunction indicator. Now you also get real-time service bookings based on mileage and time. All on a compatible smartphone. Safety & Security The cool new Glanza has got you covered with guest driver monitoring, valet profile and auto collision notification to emergency contacts. All these features and more await you on your hatch-up plans. Find the Toyota i-Connect app on Google Play StoreTM and Apple App StoreTM. Smart watch connectivity & advanced voice control Guess what time it is. Time to hatch matchless convenience. When paired with compatible smartwatches, you get access to exciting features. Anytime, from anywhere. That's not it. You also get to access these features via Siri on your smartphone. A K series petrol engine with a mileage of 22.94 km/l.* E-CNG technology with a mileage of 30.61 km/kg.* *Disclaimer: Fuel Efficiency as Certified by Test Agency under Rule 115 of CMVR, 1989 under standard Test Conditions, Actual Mileage on Road may vary Awesome safety in every drive. 6 airbags The cool new Glanza has 6 airbags including front, passenger, side and curtain airbags. All to ensure your safety. TECT body The body of the cool new Glanza absorbs the energy generated during an unavoidable collision, to disperse it effectively and ensure the occupants' safety. Your hatch up plans are now safer than ever. Vehicle stability control Every twist. Every turn. Navigating them all is safer than ever, with vehicle stability control. ABS with EBD & BA Safer braking systems ensure safer drives. And the one on the cool new Glanza distributes braking pressure to all 4 wheels to maximise stopping power. Front seat PT/FL The front seat belts in the cool new Glanza are designed to provide excellent occupant protection in the event of a collision. So, fasten your seat belts no matter how quick or elaborate your hatch-up plans are. Hill hold control Driving on inclines, uncomplicated. Hill hold assist makes driving on hills a breeze.
